/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libsphereTreeWrapper.so.1 -o libsphereTreeWrapper.so.1.4 CMakeFiles/sphereTreeWrapper.dir/src/sphereTreeBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sphereTreeWrapper.dir/src/sphereTreeGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sphereTreeWrapper.dir/src/sphereTreeHubbard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sphereTreeWrapper.dir/src/sphereTreeMedial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sphereTreeWrapper.dir/src/sphereTreeOctree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sphereTreeWrapper.dir/src/sphereTreeSpawn.cpp.o  ../../third_party/sphere_tree/libSTG.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 /usr/lib/libirmv_core.so ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/API/libAPI.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/API/SFWhite/libSFWhite.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/BBox/libBBox.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/BBox/MVBB/libMVBB.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/BBox/qHull/libqHull.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Exceptions/libExceptions.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/MedialAxis/libMedialAxis.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/MinMax/libMinMax.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/SphereTree/libSphereTree.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Surface/libSurface.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Base/libBase.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Geometry/libGeometry.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Geometry/pcube/libpcube.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/LinearAlgebra/libMatrix.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Storage/libStorage.a ../../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Export/libExport.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed -luv
